# Dataview

Inline `field:: value` syntax is Dataview-specific.

```dataview
TABLE author, year FROM #book
```

## Inline fields

These are Obsidian-Dataview specific:

- author:: Alice
- year:: 2024
- rating:: 4.5

## Query node

Dataview block above; v1 detects but does not execute.
